comments.author: @GlobalRealLifeDocumentary
comments.text: Saudi Arabia is changing faster than almost any country in the world—blending ancient heritage with ambitious new developments. 🇸🇦 After watching this documentary, what's the biggest surprise for you about Saudi Arabia, and would you want to visit within the next five years? Why or why not?

replies.author: @TheGlobalTruth04
replies.text: The biggest surprise for me was how quickly Saudi Arabia is transforming while still preserving its rich history and culture. I'd definitely love to visit within the next five years to experience that contrast firsthand.
